# CamboBIA

CamboBIA means Cambodia Boutique Investment Advisory.

Public website:
- https://www.cambobia.com/
- Investors: https://www.cambobia.com/investors
- Company Updates: https://www.cambobia.com/company-updates

Website interaction:
- The public website includes an on-site assistant for visitor guidance, product discovery, and direct contact routing.

Core platform pages:
- Messenger Hub: https://www.cambobia.com/messenger-hub
- AI Learning Center: https://www.cambobia.com/ai-learning-center
- Student Portal: https://www.cambobia.com/student-portal
- Teacher Portal: https://www.cambobia.com/teacher-portal
- Banking Skills Academy: https://www.cambobia.com/banking-skills-academy
- Micro-Lending Platform: https://www.cambobia.com/micro-lending-platform
- Micro-SME Platform: https://www.cambobia.com/micro-sme-platform
- PayChain: https://www.cambobia.com/paychain
- PayKH: https://www.cambobia.com/paykh
- Pair Me Up: https://www.cambobia.com/pair-me-up

Direct product domains:
- https://msghub.cambobia.com
- https://skill.cambobia.com
- https://mytv.cambobia.com
- https://admintv.cambobia.com
- https://dbank.cambobia.com
- https://cxdot.cambobia.com
- https://game.cambobia.com
- https://paychain.cambobia.com
- https://paykh.cambobia.com

Audience summary:
- Messenger Hub is the business broadcast messaging platform for WhatsApp, Telegram, and Signal.
- AI Learning Center supports students, teachers, and banking-industry learning.
- mytv is the student portal.
- admintv is the teacher and administration portal.
- skill is the banking skills academy.
- DBank is the micro-lending platform.
- CXDot is the micro-SME platform for Telegram sales, inventory, and point of sale.
- Pair Me Up is a browser-based focus and memory game.
- PayChain is the payment operations and administration platform for wallets, reserve, treasury, compliance, reconciliation, and stablecoin-readiness review.
- PayKH is the digital payment platform for merchant checkout, KHQR-ready collection flow, and transaction support.

Contact:
- contact@cambobia.com
